channel.title: Startups on Connecting the Dots
channel.description: Recent content in Startups on Connecting the Dots

item.title: Tales from Engine Yard
item.description: Engine Yard, once a pioneer in Ruby on Rails hosting and early cloud platforms, ultimately failed due to strategic missteps.

item.title: A Startup's First PM
item.description: Sometimes a startup’s first PM is simply there to align the team.
